hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】新任美联储主席、Base 的 Azul 升级、企业盈利：未来加密货币周；【CRYPTO】有抱负的预测市场提供商表示，体育博彩应作为金融产品而不是赌博进行监管；【CRYPTO】Michael Saylor 表示，Strategy 公司每售出 1 枚比特币，就会购买 10 到 20 枚比特币：报告。

items.title: New Fed chair, Base's Azul upgrade, corporate earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 11.
items.title_zh: 新任美联储主席、Base 的 Azul 升级、企业盈利：未来加密货币周
items.summary_zh: 看看从 5 月 11 日开始的一周将会发生什么。

items.title: Sports betting should be regulated as a financial product, not gambling, aspiring prediction market provider says
items.summary: Novig CEO Jacob Fortinsky said his company will transition to a federal Designated Contract Market framework this summer to launch in all 50 states, while 57 Maiden's Adam Mastrelli said he was banned from two major sportsbooks within two months for being “sharp."
items.title_zh: 有抱负的预测市场提供商表示，体育博彩应作为金融产品而不是赌博进行监管
items.summary_zh: Novig 首席执行官 Jacob Fortinsky 表示，他的公司将于今年夏天过渡到联邦指定合同市场框架，并在所有 50 个州推出，而 57 Maiden 的 Adam Mastrelli 表示，他在两个月内因“敏锐”而被两家主要体育博彩公司禁止。

items.title: Michael Saylor says Strategy would buy ’10 to 20′ bitcoin for every one it sells: report
items.summary: During Strategy's earnings call last week, Saylor said the firm will consider tapping its bitcoin holdings to fund STRC dividends.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor 表示，Strategy 公司每售出 1 枚比特币，就会购买 10 到 20 枚比特币：报告
items.summary_zh: 在 Strategy 上周的财报电话会议上，Saylor 表示，该公司将考虑利用其持有的比特币来为 STRC 股息提供资金。

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s bitcoin ETF absorbs $194 million in first month with no net daily outflows
items.summary: Most of MSBT's capital came from self-directed clients since the bank's 16,000-person financial advisor network is not yet cleared to recommend the fund.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利比特币 ETF 第一个月吸纳 1.94 亿美元，每日无净流出
items.summary_zh: MSBT 的大部分资金来自自主客户，因为该银行 16,000 人的财务顾问网络尚未获准推荐该基金。

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.summary_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title: Lebanese Mourn Eight Members of One Family Killed in Israeli Strike
items.summary: Israel has escalated attacks on Lebanon since Thursday, further unraveling a truce in its war with Hezbollah. Among those killed on Saturday was a 6-month-old infant, relatives said.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩哀悼在以色列袭击中丧生的一个家庭的八名成员
items.summary_zh: 自周四以来，以色列升级了对黎巴嫩的袭击，进一步破坏了与真主党的停战协议。亲属称，周六遇难的人中有一名 6 个月大的婴儿。

items.title: Bitcoin mining pools with 75% of BTC hashrate join open standard for block construction
items.summary: Foundry, AntPool, F2Pool, SpiderPool, and MARA Pool are among seven pools joining the Stratum V2 working group, putting nearly three-quarters of global bitcoin hashrate behind a protocol that returns block construction decisions to individual miners.
items.title_zh: 拥有 75% BTC 算力的比特币矿池加入区块构建开放标准
items.summary_zh: Foundry、AntPool、F2Pool、SpiderPool 和 MARA Pool 是加入 Stratum V2 工作组的七个矿池之一，将全球近四分之三的比特币算力置于将区块构建决策返回给个体矿工的协议之上。

items.title: Bitcoin briefly tops $82,000 on improving macro conditions; Sui jumps 25%
items.summary: Sui surged 25% over the last 24 hours, as analysts pointed to Sui Group Holdings' decision to stake 108.7 million SUI.
items.title_zh: 由于宏观环境改善，比特币短暂突破 82,000 美元；隋跃升25%
items.summary_zh: 由于分析师指出 Sui Group Holdings 决定增持 1.087 亿股 SUI，Sui 在过去 24 小时内股价飙升 25%。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.summary: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
items.summary: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，美国与伊朗 2027 年达成核协议的可能性上升
items.summary_zh: 此前，Axios 周三报道称，两国即将签署一页备忘录来结束战争。

items.title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.summary: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.summary_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title: Asian Development Bank's $70 billion energy and digital infra push puts Southeast Asia center stage
items.summary: Southeast Asia to benefit significantly from Asian Development Bank's $70 billion new energy and digital infrastructure plan in Asia and the Pacific by 2035.
items.title_zh: 亚洲开发银行斥资 700 亿美元推动能源和数字基础设施建设，使东南亚成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 到 2035 年，东南亚将从亚洲开发银行在亚太地区 700 亿美元的新能源和数字基础设施计划中受益匪浅。

items.title: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
items.summary: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.
items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候
items.summary_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
items.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.
items.title_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官罗文警告市场调整，抨击竞争对手保险公司的“恶劣”做法
items.summary_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官马克·罗文（Marc Rowan）警告说，市场面临意外冲击的风险较高，并表示他正在为公司做好防御性调整，以应对预期的调整。

items.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
items.summary: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗对美国结束战争提议的反应“完全不可接受”
items.summary_zh: 据报道，伊朗希望解除美国的海上封锁，承认伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的主权，并赔偿战争损失。

items.title: His father had just been buried. Then West Bank settlers forced him to dig up the body
items.summary: The UN human rights office condemns incident as "'appalling and emblematic of the dehumanisation of Palestinians" in the West Bank.
items.title_zh: 他的父亲刚刚下葬。然后西岸定居者强迫他挖出尸体
items.summary_zh: 联合国人权办公室谴责约旦河西岸发生的这一事件“令人震惊，是巴勒斯坦人非人化的象征”。

items.title: Iran activists tell BBC how threat of war intensifies trauma of repression
items.summary: A dissident in Tehran says she feels helpless and under immense psychological pressure.
items.title_zh: 伊朗活动人士告诉 BBC 战争威胁如何加剧镇压造成的创伤
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰的一名持不同政见者表示，她感到无助并承受着巨大的心理压力。

items.title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
items.summary: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.
items.title_zh: 特朗普驳回伊朗结束战争的提议后油价上涨
items.summary_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡水道仍然有效关闭，严重扰乱了全球能源运输。

items.title: Modi urges Indians to work from home and limit foreign travel as Iran war continues
items.summary: He said the austerity measures would reduce India's fuel use and help save foreign exchange.
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗战争的继续，莫迪敦促印度人在家工作并限制出国旅行
items.summary_zh: 他表示，紧缩措施将减少印度的燃料使用并有助于节省外汇。

items.title: After Capturing Maduro, Trump Celebrated Victory. Did It Bring Venezuelans Home?
items.summary: Dire conditions in Venezuela prompted an exodus. In the wake of the attack that ousted its top leader, the question is whether things have changed enough to make a return appealing.
items.title_zh: 抓获马杜罗后，特朗普庆祝胜利。它把委内瑞拉人带回家了吗？
items.summary_zh: 委内瑞拉的严峻形势促使人们逃亡。在罢黜其最高领导人的袭击事件发生后，问题是事情是否已经发生了足以使回归有吸引力的变化。

items.title: Mass Layoffs in Iran as Businesses Buckle Under Wartime Pressures
items.summary: Iran was already struggling economically before 2026 brought widespread instability. A government-imposed internet shutdown has crippled an entire sector.
items.title_zh: 伊朗企业在战时压力下陷入大规模裁员
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年带来广泛的不稳定之前，伊朗已经陷入经济困境。政府强制关闭互联网已经瘫痪了整个行业。

items.title: Crypto.com receives UAE license tied to Dubai government crypto payments
items.summary: Crypto.com's UAE entity became the first VASP to receive a UAE central bank SVF license tied to Dubai government crypto payment services.
items.title_zh: Crypto.com 获得与迪拜政府加密支付相关的阿联酋许可证
items.summary_zh: Crypto.com 的阿联酋实体成为第一个获得与迪拜政府加密支付服务相关的阿联酋央行 SVF 许可证的 VASP。

items.title: BoE’s Bailey warns of looming ‘wrestle’ with US over stablecoin rules, flags run risk for UK
items.summary: Bailey, who chairs the Financial Stability Board, warned that hard-to-redeem U.S. stablecoins could flood into jurisdictions like the UK during a crisis.
items.title_zh: 英国央行贝利警告称，与美国就稳定币规则展开“角力”迫在眉睫，英国面临风险
items.summary_zh: 金融稳定委员会主席贝利警告说，在危机期间，难以兑换的美国稳定币可能会涌入英国等司法管辖区。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zano (ZANO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #201.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：ZANO (ZANO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 201。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #84.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 84。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Sui (SUI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #23.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Sui (SUI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 23 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Osmosis (OSMO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #477.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Osmosis (OSMO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#477。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Ondo (ONDO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Ondo (ONDO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
items.summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.
items.title_zh: 在 OpenAI 上安全运行 Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何通过沙箱、审批、网络策略和代理本机遥测技术安全地运行 Codex，以支持安全且合规的编码代理采用。

items.title: Simplex rethinks software development with Codex
items.summary: Simplex boosts software development with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, reducing design, build, and testing time while scaling AI-driven workflows.
items.title_zh: Simplex 使用 Codex 重新思考软件开发
items.summary_zh: Simplex 通过 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 促进软件开发，减少设计、构建和测试时间，同时扩展人工智能驱动的工作流程。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: U.S.-China Rivalry Reaches South American Skies
items.summary: The U.S. has pressed Argentina and Chile to review two Chinese telescope projects in the Andean deserts. Astronomers are worried about setbacks to research.
items.title_zh: 中美竞争蔓延至南美上空
items.summary_zh: 美国已敦促阿根廷和智利审查中国在安第斯沙漠的两个望远镜项目。天文学家担心研究会遇到挫折。

items.title: Bitcoin, Nasdaq investors are celebrating, while U.S. consumers turn gloomy
items.summary: Bitcoin and Nasdaq have rallied sharply, but U.S. consumer sentiment has fallen to historic lows, highlighting a widening Wall Street–Main Street divide.
items.title_zh: 比特币、纳斯达克投资者欢欣鼓舞，而美国消费者却变得悲观
items.summary_zh: 比特币和纳斯达克指数大幅上涨，但美国消费者信心已跌至历史低点，凸显了华尔街与主街分歧的扩大。

items.title: XRP spikes 2.5%, beating bitcoin and ether, in breakout above $1.45
items.summary: Sharp move through resistance came with one of the biggest volume spikes in weeks, though profit-taking quickly emerged near session highs.
items.title_zh: XRP 飙升 2.5%，击败比特币和以太币，突破 1.45 美元
items.summary_zh: 尽管获利了结很快出现在盘中高点附近，但突破阻力位的急剧走势带来了数周来最大的成交量飙升之一。

items.title: A bitcoin whale that went silent in 2013 moves $40 million in BTC
items.summary: A long-dormant whale woke up Sunday, moving millions worth of bitcoin on-chain.
items.title_zh: 2013 年沉默的比特币鲸鱼转移了价值 4000 万美元的比特币
items.summary_zh: 周日，一头长期休眠的鲸鱼苏醒了，将价值数百万美元的比特币转移到了链上。

items.title: Trump Media’s Q1 loss widens to $406 million on bitcoin, CRO markdowns
items.summary: The loss was primarily driven by $244 million in unrealized losses on cryptocurrency holdings and an additional $108.2 million investment loss.
items.title_zh: Trump Media 第一季度因比特币和 CRO 降价而亏损扩大至 4.06 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该损失主要是由于持有加密货币的 2.44 亿美元未实现损失以及 1.082 亿美元的额外投资损失造成的。

items.title: Bitcoin whale address moves $41 million in BTC after 12-year dormancy: onchain data
items.summary: During the 12 years of inactivity, the value of 500 BTC has appreciated 89-fold, from $457,070 to $40.6 million.
items.title_zh: 比特币鲸鱼地址在休眠 12 年之后转移了 4100 万美元的 BTC：链上数据
items.summary_zh: 在闲置的 12 年里，500 BTC 的价值已经升值了 89 倍，从 457,070 美元增至 4060 万美元。

items.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
items.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.

items.summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.

items.title: How ChatGPT learns about the world while protecting privacy
items.summary: Learn how ChatGPT safeguards your privacy, reduces personal data in training, and gives you control over whether your conversations improve AI models.

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: How much further does this Teflon market have to go? Here's what traders say
items.summary: Traders on prediction markets platform Kalshi place a more than 50% chance that the S&P 500 crosses 8,000 in 2026.
items.title_zh: 特氟龙市场还有多远的路要走？这是贸易商的说法
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，标普 500 指数在 2026 年突破 8,000 点的可能性超过 50%。

items.title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
items.summary: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，今天的市场感觉就像“1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月”
items.summary_zh: “股市上涨或下跌并不是因为就业或消费者信心，”伯里写道。 “感觉就像 1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月。”

items.title: US and French nationals test positive for hantavirus after leaving ship
items.summary: The American national has arrived in Nebraska, while a French woman is isolating in Paris.
items.title_zh: 美国和法国国民下船后汉坦病毒检测呈阳性
items.summary_zh: 这名美国公民已抵达内布拉斯加州，而一名法国女性正在巴黎接受隔离。

items.title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
items.summary: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.
items.title_zh: 法国国民从受汉坦病毒袭击的船只返回后出现症状
items.summary_zh: 法国总理表示，MV Hondius 号的五名乘客将在巴黎接受隔离，“直至另行通知”。

items.title: Ailing Iran Nobel laureate given bail and hospital transfer
items.summary: Iranian authorities granted human rights activist Narges Mohammadi bail amid growing concern over her poor health in prison.
items.title_zh: 患病的伊朗诺贝尔奖获得者获得保释并转院

items.title: Thailand's divisive ex-PM is out of jail, but is the Thaksin era over?
items.summary: Thaksin seems incapable of taking a back seat. This time, it really could be different.
items.title_zh: 泰国分裂的前总理出狱了，但他信时代结束了吗？
items.summary_zh: 他信似乎无法退居二线。这一次，情况真的可能会有所不同。

items.title: Dua Lipa sues Samsung for $15m over use of her image on TV boxes
items.summary: The pop star's legal team alleges a photograph of her face was used on Samsung television boxes without permission.

items.summary_zh: 这位流行歌星的法律团队声称，未经许可，三星电视盒上使用了她的脸部照片。

items.title: Putin’s Forces Are Barely Inching Along on the Battlefield
items.summary: The Russian military has yet to solve a fundamental problem: how to make big advances in eastern Ukraine when drones are everywhere.
items.title_zh: 普京的军队在战场上勉强前进
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯军方尚未解决一个根本问题：当无人机无处不在时，如何在乌克兰东部取得重大进展。

items.summary_zh: 但如果他的对手发起挑战，情况会如何发展呢？

items.title: Trump Says Iran’s Response to Latest U.S. Proposal ‘Totally Unacceptable’
items.summary: The United States and Iran have been discussing a 30-day extension to their cease-fire and a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗对美国最新提案的反应“完全不可接受”
items.summary_zh: 美国和伊朗一直在讨论将停火期限延长30天以及重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title: Cruise Ship Linked to Hantavirus Outbreak Arrives in Spain’s Canary Islands for Disembarking
items.summary: Small groups of passengers and crew left the ship after it anchored off Spain’s Canary Islands on Sunday. Those aboard were expected to be flown to their home countries, officials said.
items.title_zh: 与汉坦病毒爆发有关的游轮抵达西班牙加那利群岛下船
items.summary_zh: 周日，该船在西班牙加那利群岛附近抛锚后，一小群乘客和船员离开了该船。官员们表示，预计机上人员将乘飞机返回自己的祖国。

items.title: British Paratroopers Deliver Aid to Remote Islands With Possible Hantavirus Case
items.summary: The British military took critical medical supplies to Tristan da Cunha, a tiny British archipelago where authorities have identified a suspected hantavirus case.
items.title_zh: 英国伞兵向可能患有汉坦病毒病例的偏远岛屿提供援助
items.summary_zh: 英国军方向特里斯坦达库尼亚群岛运送了重要的医疗用品，特里斯坦达库尼亚群岛是英国的一个小群岛，当局在那里发现了一例疑似汉坦病毒病例。

items.title: The Man Who Cuts the Perfect Slice of Ham
items.summary: Spaniards line up at weddings, tennis tournaments and galas to eat ham prepared by Ernesto Soriano, one of the world’s best slicers of jamón ibérico.

items.summary_zh: 西班牙人在婚礼、网球比赛和庆典上排队享用埃内斯托·索里亚诺（Ernesto Soriano）制作的火腿，他是世界上最好的伊比利亚火腿切片师之一。

items.summary_zh: 这是忙碌的一周。

items.title: Agentic commerce will run on crypto rails, PayPal and Google reps tell Consensus Miami
items.summary: Senior figures from PayPal and Google Cloud said open payment protocols, machine-readable merchant catalogs and multi-party crypto custody are needed to scale agentic commerce.
items.title_zh: 贝宝和谷歌代表告诉迈阿密共识，代理商务将在加密轨道上运行
items.summary_zh: PayPal 和谷歌云的高级人士表示，需要开放支付协议、机器可读的商家目录和多方加密货币托管来扩大代理商务规模。

items.title: Bored Ape NFTs are finally making a comeback as crypto traders rediscover their appetite for risk
items.summary: BAYC floor prices have doubled in a month as traders rotate back into speculative crypto bets, reviving hopes of a broader NFT recovery.
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币交易者重新发现他们的风险偏好，Bored Ape NFT 终于卷土重来
items.summary_zh: 随着交易员重新转向投机性加密货币押注，BAYC 底价在一个月内翻了一番，重新燃起了人们对 NFT 更广泛复苏的希望。

items.title: Australia to propose capital gains tax changes affecting crypto investors: reports
items.summary: The government plans to replace a 50% capital gains tax discount on assets held for more than one year, according to AFR.

items.summary_zh: 据 AFR 报道，政府计划取消对持有一年以上资产的 50% 资本利得税折扣。

items.summary_zh: Capital B宣布通过私募筹集了1520万欧元，将用于购买182 BTC。

items.summary: The order shields anyone who votes on the transfer from being held in violation of the freeze, though the ultimate fate of the funds remains unclear.

items.summary_zh: 该命令保护任何对转账进行投票的人不因违反冻结规定而被扣留，尽管这些资金的最终命运仍不清楚。
